title: Make bare airlock a successful discovery surface
summary: Bare invocation now prints useful help with agent entrypoints and exits 0 instead of treating a reasonable first command as a refusal.
diff_sketch: dispatch None writes long help to stdout and returns VERIFY_PASS; top-level help includes agent entrypoints and core flow
risk: low; no domain command behavior changes

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: bare invocation is the first command many agents try

anchor_quote: First command an agent guesses must work or redirect with a useful hint.

title: Add top-level --robot-triage mega-command
summary: Agents can now get a read-only machine triage packet with one global flag rather than discovering the doctor namespace first.
diff_sketch: add Cli.robot_triage and dispatch to doctor triage JSON
risk: low; read-only alias to existing doctor surface
anchor_quote: One mega-command returns multiple useful slices in a single call.
counter_example: agent must read README before finding doctor --robot-triage

title: Add top-level capabilities --json
summary: Expose the machine-readable command, side-effect, config, refusal, and schema contract at the standard agent-discovery path.
diff_sketch: add Capabilities subcommand alias and enrich doctor capabilities with full CLI contract
risk: low; read-only alias plus additive JSON fields
anchor_quote: A capabilities --json surface exists for the tool.
counter_example: doctor-only capabilities hidden under a namespace

title: Add top-level robot-docs guide
summary: Provide paste-ready in-tool agent documentation at a standard top-level command while preserving the existing doctor robot-docs surface.
diff_sketch: add RobotDocs subcommand with optional guide child and dispatch to doctor robot docs
anchor_quote: robot-docs guide prints a paste-ready agent handbook in-tool.
counter_example: agent must leave CLI for README before acting

title: Add explain --json
summary: The read-side explain command now has deterministic JSON for agents that need to parse the manifest explanation without scraping text.
diff_sketch: add ExplainArgs.json and airlock.explain.v1 summary emitted through canonical_json

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: read-side command previously required text scraping

anchor_quote: Every read-side command has --json or robot mode.
counter_example: scraping human explain output for blocked paths

title: Teach common JSON and timestamp mistakes
summary: Unknown --json typos now point to the robot triage command, and witness timestamp refusals include a copyable RFC3339 command.
diff_sketch: add parse-error hinting for --jsno/--jason/--jsson/--josn and bad_input_with_next_command for witness timestamp filters
risk: low; only previously-erroring invocations change diagnostics

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: prevents retry loops on common mistakes

anchor_quote: Every error names the exact flag or command the agent should have used.
